channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: All U.S. passengers returning from Ebola-affected countries must arrive at one airport
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security is requiring all U.S. passengers returning from Ebola-affected countries to arrive at a single airport: Washington-Dulles International Airport in Virginia.
item.content:encoded: The Department of Homeland Security is requiring all U.S. passengers returning from Ebola-affected countries to arrive at a single airport: Washington-Dulles International Airport in Virginia.
item.dc:creator: Pien Huang

item.title: Hunger grows in Gaza as food aid is cut due to higher costs caused by war in Iran
item.description: The U.S.-Israeli war against Iran is driving up the cost of food, leading to funding shortfalls and higher expenses for critical food aid in Gaza.
item.content:encoded: The U.S.-Israeli war against Iran is driving up the cost of food, leading to funding shortfalls and higher expenses for critical food aid in Gaza.
item.dc:creator: Anas Baba

item.title: Jack Antonoff returns to his own music with a new Bleachers album
item.description: Jack Antonoff is a producer to stars like Taylor Swift and Lana del Rey, but today he is dropping a new album with his band, Bleachers. Our reviewer hears a lot of longing for connection on the album.
item.content:encoded: Jack Antonoff is a producer to stars like Taylor Swift and Lana del Rey, but today he is dropping a new album with his band, Bleachers. Our reviewer hears a lot of longing for connection on the album.

item.title: How a spirit of kindness grew in the aftermath of a tornado — and remains 15 years on
item.description: Fifteen years ago, after a massive tornado flattened much of Joplin, Mo., nearly 100,000 volunteers helped the town rebuild. A spirit of community service lives on in Joplin today.
item.content:encoded: Fifteen years ago, after a massive tornado flattened much of Joplin, Mo., nearly 100,000 volunteers helped the town rebuild. A spirit of community service lives on in Joplin today.
item.dc:creator: Pauline Bartolone

item.title: U.S. aid cuts are affecting HIV/AIDS care in Sub-Saharan Africa
item.description: NPR's Juana Summers recaps a recent reporting trip to South Africa and Mozambique focused on the current state of AIDS treatment in light of U.S. foreign aid changes.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Juana Summers recaps a recent reporting trip to South Africa and Mozambique focused on the current state of AIDS treatment in light of U.S. foreign aid changes.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Jarenwattananon

item.title: Stephen Colbert's 'Late Show' finale mixed music, satire and a warning for late night
item.description: Stephen Colbert ended The Late Show with guests including Paul McCartney. The show's cancellation has many wondering about the future of late-night comedy in today's political climate.
item.content:encoded: Stephen Colbert ended The Late Show with guests including Paul McCartney. The show's cancellation has many wondering about the future of late-night comedy in today's political climate.
item.dc:creator: Mandalit del Barco

item.title: A film festival bridges two communities at the U.S.-Mexico border
item.description: Audiences on both sides of the U.S.-Mexico border wall in Nogales, Arizona and Nogales, Sonora gathered to watch the same films at the same time at a cross-border film festival.
item.content:encoded: Audiences on both sides of the U.S.-Mexico border wall in Nogales, Arizona and Nogales, Sonora gathered to watch the same films at the same time at a cross-border film festival.
item.dc:creator: Nina Kravinsky

item.title: Trump's week in Washington marked by wins at the ballot box and headaches on the Hill
item.description: President Trump's week included high highs, with major election wins in his test of Republican loyalty, and low lows as he attacked Congressional allies and faced legislative defeat.
item.content:encoded: President Trump's week included high highs, with major election wins in his test of Republican loyalty, and low lows as he attacked Congressional allies and faced legislative defeat.
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith

item.title: Texas Senate race: Republican divides and Trump's influence face a critical test
item.description: The Texas Senate primary has become a microcosm of the divide among Republicans in the country and a window into President Trump's influence.
item.content:encoded: The Texas Senate primary has become a microcosm of the divide among Republicans in the country and a window into President Trump's influence.
item.dc:creator: Claudia Grisales

item.title: Trump cancels AI executive order signing
item.description: President Trump struggles to make a plan for artificial intelligence regulation after initially taking a hands off position on the emerging technology.
item.content:encoded: President Trump struggles to make a plan for artificial intelligence regulation after initially taking a hands off position on the emerging technology.
item.dc:creator: Deepa Shivaram
